settings.name: Minimum Stop Duration (seconds)
settings.description: Minimum time in seconds that an animal must remain within the stop area to be counted as a stop. Increase to filter out brief pauses; decrease to capture shorter stops.

settings.name: Maximum Stop Diameter (metres)
settings.description: Diameter in metres of the area within which the animal must remain for the stop to be detected. Smaller values require the animal to stay in a tighter area.

settings.name: Bounding Box Buffer (degrees)
settings.description: Padding added around the bounding box of detected stop points when fetching the OSM road network. Increase to include more surrounding road context.

settings.name: Road Network Coverage
settings.description: Controls which OSM road types are fetched. Minimal is fastest; All roads is slowest but most complete. Ignored if Custom OSM Tag Filter is set.

settings.name: Custom OSM Tag Filter
settings.description: Advanced: Overpass filter string to override Road Network Coverage. Leave empty to use the selection above. Example: ["highway"~"motorway|primary|cycleway"]

references.note: Graser, A. (2019). MovingPandas: Efficient Structures for Movement Data in Python. GI_Forum ‒ Journal of Geographic Information Science 2019, 1-2019, 54-68.
